top3.sql:
SELECT customers.Segment 
FROM transactions_1k 
JOIN customers ON transactions_1k.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID 
WHERE transactions_1k.Date = '2012-08-24' 
  AND transactions_1k.Amount = 548.4;

SELECT c.Currency
FROM customers c
JOIN transactions_1k t ON c.CustomerID = t.CustomerID
WHERE t.Date = '2012-08-24' AND t.Amount = 548.4;
